name: auxhomeservices.com
message: Aux Home Services is a trusted provider of plumbing, electrical, heating, and air conditioning services in Birmingham, Alabama, along with Jefferson and Shelby counties. They pride themselves on delivering prompt and reliable service, available 24/7, with skilled technicians who respect and clean up after their work. The company emphasizes upfront pricing and quality craftsmanship, ensuring customer satisfaction. Their diverse range of services includes AC and heating installations, plumbing repairs, and electrical systems management. Employees: 50 Revenue: $6.9 Million Industry: Construction Management  Phone Number: (205) 979-0946
